column2: #Two sample t-test because each lane represents the apoplastic proteome from a plant infiltrated with either EV or Gsn, so each sample is independent.
shapiro.test(RCAIGsn)#The p-values are 0.3907 and 0.3318, so the data is not significantly non-normal.
F test to compare two variances
F = 0.01527, num df = 2, denom df = 2, p-value = 0.03008
#F = 0.01527, num df = 2, denom df = 2, p-value = 0.03008. the variances were not equal, so I used Welch's t-test.
tRCAI <- t.test(RCAIEV, RCAIGsn, alternative = "two.sided", var.equal = FALSE)
